fields.name: Resource Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code you can use to assign numbers to resources.

fields.name: Time Sheet Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code you can use to assign document numbers to time sheets.

fields.name: Time Sheet First Weekday
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first weekday to use on a time sheet. The default is Monday.

fields.name: Time Sheet by Job Approval
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether time sheets must be approved on a per job basis by the user specified for the job.

fields.name: Time Sheet Submission Policy
fields.tooltip: Specifies the policy for submitting time sheets.

fields.name: Incl. Time Sheet Date in Jnl.
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the date of the time sheets entry is included in the description in project journal line.
